query:
INSERT INTO `lab_order_templates` (`protocolId`, `templateName`, `description`, `category`, `labTests`) VALUES
('fatigue', 'Fatigue Workup - First Line', 'Essential first-line laboratory tests for fatigue evaluation', 'first_line', JSON_ARRAY(
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Complete Metabolic Panel (CMP)', 'testCode', '80053', 'description', 'Comprehensive metabolic panel including glucose, electrolytes, kidney and liver function', 'normalRange', 'Varies by component', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Thyroid Stimulating Hormone (TSH)', 'testCode', '84443', 'description', 'Screening test for thyroid function', 'normalRange', '0.4-4.0 mIU/L', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Free T4', 'testCode', '84439', 'description', 'Direct measurement of thyroid hormone', 'normalRange', '0.8-1.8 ng/dL', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Complete Blood Count with Differential', 'testCode', '85025', 'description', 'Screens for anemia, infection, and blood disorders', 'normalRange', 'Varies by component', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Ferritin', 'testCode', '82728', 'description', 'Iron storage marker', 'normalRange', '12-300 ng/mL', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Total Iron Binding Capacity (TIBC)', 'testCode', '83550', 'description', 'Measures iron transport capacity', 'normalRange', '250-450 mcg/dL', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Serum Iron', 'testCode', '83540', 'description', 'Direct measurement of iron levels', 'normalRange', '60-170 mcg/dL', 'priority', 'routine')
)),
('fatigue', 'Fatigue Workup - Additional Tests', 'Additional laboratory tests based on clinical suspicion', 'additional', JSON_ARRAY(
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Vitamin D, 25-Hydroxy', 'testCode', '82306', 'description', 'Vitamin D deficiency screening', 'normalRange', '30-100 ng/mL', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Vitamin B12', 'testCode', '82607', 'description', 'B12 deficiency screening', 'normalRange', '200-900 pg/mL', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Hemoglobin A1c', 'testCode', '83036', 'description', 'Diabetes screening', 'normalRange', '<5.7%', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Erythrocyte Sedimentation Rate (ESR)', 'testCode', '85652', 'description', 'Nonspecific inflammation marker', 'normalRange', '<20 mm/hr', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'C-Reactive Protein (CRP)', 'testCode', '86140', 'description', 'Inflammation marker', 'normalRange', '<3.0 mg/L', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Urinalysis', 'testCode', '81001', 'description', 'Screening for kidney disease, infection, diabetes', 'normalRange', 'Varies by component', 'priority', 'routine')
)),
('fatigue', 'Fatigue Workup - Specialized Tests', 'Specialized tests for specific clinical scenarios', 'specialized', JSON_ARRAY(
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Morning Cortisol', 'testCode', '82533', 'description', 'Adrenal insufficiency screening', 'normalRange', '6-23 mcg/dL (AM)', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Antinuclear Antibody (ANA)', 'testCode', '86038', 'description', 'Autoimmune disease screening', 'normalRange', 'Negative', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Rheumatoid Factor', 'testCode', '86431', 'description', 'Rheumatoid arthritis screening', 'normalRange', '<14 IU/mL', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Creatine Kinase (CK)', 'testCode', '82550', 'description', 'Muscle disease screening', 'normalRange', '30-200 U/L', 'priority', 'routine'),
  JSON_OBJECT('testName', 'Sleep Study (Polysomnography)', 'testCode', '95810', 'description', 'Comprehensive sleep disorder evaluation', 'normalRange', 'AHI <5', 'priority', 'routine')
));
